sections.paragraph:
f. דָּוָה adj.-

(1) languid, sick, used of women in menstruation. Lev 15:33, דָּוָה בְנִדָּתָהּ; Lev 20:18. Hence דָּוָה Isa 30:22, a menstruous garment, i.e. polluted by the menses.

(2) sick of mind, sad, Lam 5:17.

(3) afflicted, wretched, Lam 1:13. (Syr. ܕܘܳܐ to grieve, to be unfortunate. Aph. to afflict, to make unhappy. ܕܘܳܝܳܐ unfortunate, unhappy. ܕܘܽܘܳܢܐܳ misfortune, misery.)
